name: multi-company-portal
description: Multi-company login portal that hosts the FinTrack financial app per tenant, with master/staff accounts.
whatsNew: Search page: typing an amount now matches that exact amount only (e.g. 1500 no longer also finds 1500.50). Commas are fine — 1,500 works too.
The keyword box still also searches by notes, plus name, ID and bank.
